items.abstract_zh: 当今使用最广泛的编程语言是托管语言。它们之所以受欢迎，是因为它们的丰富功能改善了代码开发的许多方面，包括提高生产力和安全性。然而，随着产品或服务的使用规模扩大，性能问题就成为一个问题。然后，开发人员经常面临复杂的选择，因为他们必须决定是否可以从现有代码中榨取所需的性能，或者他们的语言是否已达到其性能极限，需要多年的代码才能移植到新的性能更高的语言。更糟糕的是，运行时性能笼罩在神秘之中，因为它涉及不同组件的复杂交互，例如解释器、即时 (JIT) 编译器、线程库和垃圾收集 (GC) 系统。我们以 C++ 作为基准，对 Java、Go、JavaScript 和 Python 进行了深入的性能分析和比较。我们仔细检测了不同的语言运行时，以便开发人员可以精确测量执行任何字节码指令所需的周期数，或 JavaScript 中动态类型检查的开销。这使我们能够准确地识别开销来源。我们进一步从头开始创建了 6 个应用程序来建立 LangBench 基准；这些应用程序涵盖了一系列复杂性，并且涵盖了计算强度、内存使用、网络和磁盘 I/O 强度以及可用并发数方面不同的各种应用场景。我们全面分析它们的完成时间、资源使用情况和可扩展性。总体而言，我们发现 V8/Node.js 和 CPython 表现出过多的开销，执行应用程序的速度平均分别比 C++ 慢 8.01 倍和 29.50 倍。更糟糕的是，这两个运行时上的应用程序扩展性很差，因为它们无法有效地利用多个内核。相比之下，OpenJDK 和 Go 应用程序的性能与 C++ 相比具有竞争力，运行速度分别仅慢 1.43 倍和 1.30 倍，并且它们可以轻松扩展到多核。在某些应用程序中，OpenJDK 和 Go 的性能优于 C++ 同类应用程序。

items.title: NVMe SSD Failures in the Field: the Fail-Stop and the Fail-Slow.
items.abstract: NVMe SSD has become a staple in modern datacenters thanks to its high throughput and ultra-low latency. Despite its popularity, the reliability of NVMe SSD under mass deployment remains unknown. In this paper, we collect logs from over one million NVMe SSDs deployed at Alibaba, and conduct extensive analysis. From the study, we identify a series of major reliability changes in NVMe SSD. On the good side, NVMe SSD becomes more resilient to early failures and variances of access patterns. On the bad side, NVMe SSD becomes more vulnerable to complicated correlated failures. More importantly, we discover that the ultra-low latency nature makes NVMe SSD much more likely to be impacted by fail-slow failures.
items.abstract_zh: 凭借其高吞吐量和超低延迟，NVMe SSD 已成为现代数据中心的主要产品。尽管 NVMe SSD 很受欢迎，但大规模部署下的可靠性仍然未知。在本文中，我们收集了阿里巴巴部署的超过一百万个 NVMe SSD 的日志，并进行了广泛的分析。从研究中，我们发现了 NVMe SSD 的一系列主要可靠性变化。从好的方面来说，NVMe SSD 对于早期故障和访问模式的变化变得更有弹性。不利的一面是，NVMe SSD 更容易受到复杂的相关故障的影响。更重要的是，我们发现超低延迟特性使得 NVMe SSD 更容易受到慢速故障的影响。

items.title: DepFast: Orchestrating Code of Quorum Systems.
items.abstract: Quorum systems (e.g., replicated state machines) are critical distributed systems. Building correct, high-performance quorum systems is known to be hard. A major reason is that the protocols in quorum systems lead to non-deterministic state changes and complex branching conditions based on different events (e.g., timeouts). Traditionally, these systems are built with an asynchronous coding style with event-driven callbacks, but often lead to “callback hell” that makes code hard to follow and maintain. Converting to synchronous coding styles (e.g., using coroutines) is challenging because of the complex branching conditions. In this paper, we present Dependably Fast (DepFast), an effective, expressive framework for developing quorum systems. DepFast provides a unique QuorumEvent abstraction to enable building quorum systems in a synchronous style. It also supports composition of multiple events, e.g., timeouts, different quorums. To evaluate DepFast, we use it to implement two quorum systems, Raft and Copilot. We show that complex quorum systems implemented by DepFast are easy to write and have high performance. Specifically, it takes 25%–35% fewer lines of code to implement Raft and Copilot using DepFast, and the DepFast-based implementations have comparable performance with the state-of-the-art systems.
items.abstract_zh: 仲裁系统（例如，复制状态机）是关键的分布式系统。众所周知，构建正确的、高性能的仲裁系统是很困难的。一个主要原因是仲裁系统中的协议会导致不确定的状态变化和基于不同事件（例如超时）的复杂分支条件。传统上，这些系统是使用具有事件驱动回调的异步编码风格构建的，但通常会导致“回调地狱”，使代码难以遵循和维护。由于复杂的分支条件，转换为同步编码风格（例如，使用协程）具有挑战性。在本文中，我们提出了 Dependively Fast (DepFast)，这是一种用于开发仲裁系统的有效、富有表现力的框架。 DepFast 提供了独特的 QuorumEvent 抽象，可以以同步方式构建仲裁系统。它还支持多个事件的组合，例如超时、不同的法定人数。为了评估 DepFast，我们用它来实现两个仲裁系统：Raft 和 Copilot。我们证明了 DepFast 实现的复杂仲裁系统易于编写且具有高性能。具体来说，使用 DepFast 实现 Raft 和 Copilot 所需的代码行数减少了 25%–35%，并且基于 DepFast 的实现具有与最先进系统相当的性能。

items.title: Sift: Using Refinement-guided Automation to Verify Complex Distributed Systems.
items.abstract: Distributed systems are hard to design and implement correctly. Recent work has tried to use formal verification techniques to provide rigorous correctness guarantees. These works present a hard choice, though. One must either opt for the power of refinement-based approaches like IronFleet and Verdi, at the cost of large amounts of manual effort; or choose the more automated approach of I4, IC3PO, SWISS and DistAI which give up the ability to prove refinement and the power and scalability that come with it. We propose an alternative approach, Sift, that combines the power of refinement with the ability to automate proofs. Sift is a two-tier methodology that uses a new technique, refinement-guided automation , to leverage automation in a refinement proof and a divide-and-conquer technique to split a system into more refinement layers when necessary. This combination advances the frontier of what systems can be proven correct using a high degree of automation. Contrary to what was possible before, our evaluation shows that our novel approach allows us to prove the correctness of a number of systems with little manual effort, and to extend our proofs to include not just the protocols, but also an executable distributed implementation of these systems.
items.abstract_zh: 分布式系统很难正确设计和实现。最近的工作尝试使用形式验证技术来提供严格的正确性保证。然而，这些作品提出了一个艰难的选择。人们必须要么选择 IronFleet 和 Verdi 等基于细化的方法的强大功能，但需要付出大量的手动工作；要么选择这种方法。或者选择 I4、IC3PO、SWISS 和 DistAI 等更加自动化的方法，这些方法放弃了证明精细化的能力以及随之而来的功能和可扩展性。我们提出了一种替代方法 Sift，它将细化的力量与自动化证明的能力结合起来。 Sift 是一种两层方法，它使用一种新技术，即细化引导自动化，在细化证明中利用自动化，并在必要时利用分而治之的技术将系统分成更多的细化层。这种组合推进了使用高度自动化证明系统正确性的前沿。与之前的情况相反，我们的评估表明，我们的新颖方法使我们能够通过很少的手动工作来证明许多系统的正确性，并将我们的证明扩展到不仅包括协议，还包括这些系统的可执行分布式实现。

items.title: CBMM: Financial Advice for Kernel Memory Managers.
items.abstract: First-party datacenter workloads present new challenges to kernel memory management (MM), which allocates and maps memory and must balance competing performance concerns in an increasingly complex environment. In a datacenter, performance must be both good \textit{and} consistent to satisfy service-level objectives. Unfortunately, current MM designs often exhibit inconsistent, opaque behavior that is difficult to reproduce, decipher, or fix, stemming from (1) a lack of high-quality information for policymaking, (2) the cost-unawareness of many current MM policies, and (3) opaque and distributed policy implementations that are hard to debug. For example, the Linux huge page implementation is distributed across 8 files and can lead to page fault latencies in the 100s of ms. In search of a MM design that has consistent behavior, we designed Cost-Benefit MM (CBMM), which uses empirically based cost-benefit models and pre-aggregated profiling information to make MM policy decisions. In CBMM, policy decisions follow the guiding principle that \textit{userspace benefits must outweigh userspace costs}. This approach balances the performance benefits obtained by a kernel policy against the cost of applying it. CBMM has competitive performance with Linux and HawkEye, a recent research system, for all the workloads we ran, and in the presence of fragmentation, CBMM is 35% faster than Linux on average. Meanwhile, CBMM nearly always has better tail latency than Linux or HawkEye, particularly on fragmented systems. It reduces the cost of the most expensive soft page faults by 2-3 orders of magnitude for most of our workloads, and reduces the frequency of 10-1000 mu s-long faults by around 2 orders of magnitude for multiple workloads.
items.abstract_zh: 第一方数据中心工作负载给内核内存管理 (MM) 带来了新的挑战，内核内存管理 (MM) 分配和映射内存，并且必须在日益复杂的环境中平衡相互竞争的性能问题。在数据中心中，性能必须既良好又一致才能满足服务级别目标。不幸的是，当前的 MM 设计经常表现出不一致、不透明的行为，难以重现、破译或修复，原因是 (1) 缺乏用于决策的高质量信息，(2) 许多当前 MM 策略的成本意识，以及 (3) 难以调试的不透明和分布式策略实现。例如，Linux 大页面实现分布在 8 个文件中，可能导致数百毫秒的页面错误延迟。为了寻找具有一致行为的 MM 设计，我们设计了成本效益 MM (CBMM)，它使用基于经验的成本效益模型和预先聚合的分析信息来制定 MM 政策决策。在 CBMM 中，政策决策遵循\textit{用户空间收益必须超过用户空间成本}的指导原则。这种方法平衡了内核策略所获得的性能优势和应用它的成本。对于我们运行的所有工作负载，CBMM 的性能与 Linux 和 HawkEye（最近的研究系统）具有竞争力，并且在存在碎片的情况下，CBMM 平均比 Linux 快 35%。同时，CBMM 几乎总是比 Linux 或 HawkEye 具有更好的尾部延迟，特别是在碎片系统上。对于我们的大多数工作负载来说，它可以将最昂贵的软页面错误的成本降低 2-3 个数量级，对于多个工作负载来说，可以将 10-1000 mu s 长的错误频率降低大约 2 个数量级。

items.title: Margaret Martonosi, National Science Foundation.
items.abstract: The United States National Science Foundation (NSF) supports a majority of US academic research in the Computer and Information Science and Engineering (CISE) topic areas. A long-time computing researcher herself, Dr. Margaret Martonosi is now serving a 4-year term leading the NSF CISE Directorate, and stewarding the CISE directorate’s $1B+ annual budget on behalf of research, education, workforce, and infrastructure funding in CISE topic areas and for science as a whole. In this talk, she will discuss key themes for the field, how CISE is developing programmatic opportunities to advance research related to them, and also how CISE invests in cross-cutting people issues for the field as well. More broadly, she will discuss CISE and NSF in the context of the global research efforts, and our approach to industry and international research partnerships. Across it all, she will note how the ATC/OSDI community can contribute to these efforts and priorities.
items.abstract_zh: 美国国家科学基金会 (NSF) 支持美国计算机和信息科学与工程 (CISE) 主题领域的大部分学术研究。 Margaret Martonosi 博士本身就是一名长期的计算机研究员，目前担任 NSF CISE 理事会的领导职务，任期 4 年，并代表 CISE 主题领域和整个科学领域的研究、教育、劳动力和基础设施资金管理 CISE 理事会 10 亿美元以上的年度预算。在本次演讲中，她将讨论该领域的关键主题、CISE 如何开发计划性机会来推进与其相关的研究，以及 CISE 如何投资于该领域的跨领域人员问题。更广泛地说，她将在全球研究工作的背景下讨论 CISE 和 NSF，以及我们与行业和国际研究伙伴关系的方法。在这一切中，她将指出 ATC/OSDI 社区如何为这些努力和优先事项做出贡献。

items.title: PRIDWEN: Universally Hardening SGX Programs via Load-Time Synthesis.
items.abstract: A growing class of threats to Intel Software Guard Extensions (SGX) is Side-Channel Attacks (SCAs). As a response, numerous countermeasures have been proposed. However, it is hard to incorporate them to protect SGX programs against multiple SCAs simultaneously. A naive combination of distinct countermeasures does not work in practice because some of them are 1) undeployable in target environments lacking dependent hardware features, 2) redundant if there are already defenses with similar functionalities, and 3) incompatible with each other by design or implementation. Identifying all of such conditions and preparing potential workarounds before deployment are challenging, primarily when an SGX program targets multiple platforms that abstract or manipulate their configurations. Pridwen is a framework that selectively applies essential SCA countermeasures when loading an SGX program based on the configurations of the target execution platform. Pridwen allows a developer to deploy a program in the form of WebAssembly (Wasm). Upon receiving a Wasm binary, Pridwen probes the current hardware configuration, synthesizes a program (i.e., a native binary) with an optimal set of countermeasures, and validates the final binary. Pridwen supports both software-only and hardware-assisted countermeasures, and our evaluations show Pridwen efficiently, faithfully synthesizes multiple benchmark programs and real-world applications while securing them against multiple SCAs.
items.abstract_zh: 英特尔软件防护扩展 (SGX) 面临的越来越多的威胁是侧通道攻击 (SCA)。作为回应，人们提出了许多对策。然而，很难将它们合并起来以同时保护 SGX 程序免受多个 SCA 的侵害。不同对策的简单组合在实践中行不通，因为其中一些对策：1）在缺乏依赖硬件功能的目标环境中无法部署，2）如果已经存在具有类似功能的防御措施，则它们是多余的，3）在设计或实现上彼此不兼容。在部署之前识别所有此类条件并准备潜在的解决方法具有挑战性，尤其是当 SGX 程序针对抽象或操纵其配置的多个平台时。 Pridwen 是一个框架，可根据目标执行平台的配置在加载 SGX 程序时选择性地应用基本的 SCA 对策。 Pridwen 允许开发人员以 WebAssembly (Wasm) 的形式部署程序。收到 Wasm 二进制文件后，Pridwen 会探测当前的硬件配置，用一组最佳对策合成程序（即本机二进制文件），并验证最终的二进制文件。 Pridwen 支持纯软件和硬件辅助对策，我们的评估表明 Pridwen 有效、忠实地综合了多个基准程序和实际应用程序，同时保护它们免受多个 SCA 的影响。

items.title: SOTER: Guarding Black-box Inference for General Neural Networks at the Edge.
items.abstract: The prosperity of AI and edge computing has pushed more and more well-trained DNN models to be deployed on third-party edge devices to compose mission-critical applications. This necessitates protecting model confidentiality at untrusted devices, and using a co-located accelerator (e.g., GPU) to speed up model inference locally. Recently, the community has sought to improve the security with CPU trusted execution environments (TEE). However, existing solutions either run an entire model in TEE, suffering from extremely high inference latency, or take a partition-based approach to handcraft partial model via parameter obfuscation techniques to run on an untrusted GPU, achieving lower inference latency at the expense of both the integrity of partitioned computations outside TEE and accuracy of obfuscated parameters. We propose SOTER, the first system that can achieve model confidentiality, integrity, low inference latency and high accuracy in the partition-based approach. Our key observation is that there is often an \textit{associativity} property among many inference operators in DNN models. Therefore, SOTER automatically transforms a major fraction of associative operators into \textit{parameter-morphed}, thus \textit{confidentiality-preserved} operators to execute on untrusted GPU, and fully restores the execution results to accurate results with associativity in TEE. Based on these steps, SOTER further designs an \textit{oblivious fingerprinting} technique to safely detect integrity breaches of morphed operators outside TEE to ensure correct executions of inferences. Experimental results on six prevalent models in the three most popular categories show that, even with stronger model protection, SOTER achieves comparable performance with partition-based baselines while retaining the same high accuracy as insecure inference.
items.abstract_zh: 人工智能和边缘计算的繁荣推动越来越多训练有素的DNN模型部署在第三方边缘设备上，以组成关键任务应用程序。这就需要在不受信任的设备上保护模型的机密性，并使用协同定位的加速器（例如 GPU）来加速本地模型推理。最近，社区试图通过 CPU 可信执行环境 (TEE) 来提高安全性。然而，现有的解决方案要么在 TEE 中运行整个模型，从而遭受极高的推理延迟，要么采用基于分区的方法，通过参数混淆技术手工制作部分模型以在不受信任的 GPU 上运行，以牺牲 TEE 外部分区计算的完整性和混淆参数的准确性为代价来实现较低的推理延迟。我们提出了 SOTER，这是第一个能够在基于分区的方法中实现模型机密性、完整性、低推理延迟和高精度的系统。我们的主要观察结果是，DNN 模型中的许多推理算子之间通常存在 \textit{关联性} 属性。因此，SOTER 自动将大部分关联运算符转换为 \textit{parameter-morphed}，从而使 \textit{confidentiality-preserved} 运算符在不可信 GPU 上执行，并在 TEE 中将执行结果完全恢复为具有关联性的准确结果。基于这些步骤，SOTER 进一步设计了一种 \textit{oblivious Fingerprinting} 技术来安全地检测 TEE 之外的变形运算符的完整性破坏，以确保推理的正确执行。对三个最流行类别中的六个流行模型的实验结果表明，即使有更强的模型保护，SOTER 也能实现与基于分区的基线相当的性能，同时保留与不安全推理相同的高精度。

items.title: AddrMiner: A Comprehensive Global Active IPv6 Address Discovery System.
items.abstract: Fast Internet-wide scanning is essential for network situational awareness and asset evaluation. However, the vast IPv6 address space makes brute-force scanning infeasible. Although state-of-the-art techniques have made effective attempts, these methods do not work in seedless regions, while the detection efficiency is low in regions with seeds. Moreover, the constructed hitlists with low coverage cannot truly represent the active IPv6 address landscape of the Internet. This paper introduces AddrMiner, a global active IPv6 address probing system, making IPv6 active address probing systematic, comprehensive, and economical. We divide the IPv6 address space regions into three kinds according to the number of seed addresses and propose a probing algorithm for each of them. For the regions with no seeds, we propose AddrMiner-N, leveraging an organization association strategy to mine active addresses. It finds active addresses covering 86.4K BGP prefixes, accounting for 81.6\% of the probed BGP prefixes. For the regions with few seeds, we propose AddrMiner-F, utilizing a similarity matching strategy to probe active addresses further. The hit rate of active address probing is improved by 70\%-150\% compared to existing algorithms. For the regions with sufficient seeds, we propose AddrMiner-S to generate target addresses based on reinforcement learning dynamically. It nearly doubles the hit rate compared to the state-of-the-art algorithms. Finally, we deploy AddrMiner and discover 2.1 billion active IPv6 addresses, including 1.7 billion de-aliased active addresses and 0.4 billion aliased addresses, through continuous probing for 13 months. We would like to further open the door of IPv6 measurement studies by publicly releasing AddrMiner and sharing our data.
items.abstract_zh: 快速的全互联网扫描对于网络态势感知和资产评估至关重要。然而，庞大的 IPv6 地址空间使得暴力扫描变得不可行。尽管最先进的技术已经做出了有效的尝试，但这些方法在无种子地区不起作用，而在有种子地区检测效率较低。此外，所构建的覆盖率较低的命中列表无法真正代表互联网的活跃 IPv6 地址格局。本文介绍了全球主动IPv6地址探测系统AddrMiner，使IPv6主动地址探测系统化、全面化、经济化。我们根据种子地址的数量将IPv6地址空间区域分为三类，并为每种区域提出了一种探测算法。对于没有种子的区域，我们提出AddrMiner-N，利用组织关联策略来挖掘活跃地址。它发现覆盖 86.4K BGP 前缀的活动地址，占探测到的 BGP 前缀的 81.6%。对于种子较少的区域，我们提出 AddrMiner-F，利用相似性匹配策略进一步探测活动地址。主动地址探测命中率较现有算法提高70%-150%。对于种子充足的区域，我们建议AddrMiner-S基于强化学习动态生成目标地址。与最先进的算法相比，它的命中率几乎翻倍。最后，我们部署了AddrMiner，通过13个月的持续探测，发现了21亿个活跃IPv6地址，其中包括17亿个去别名活跃地址和4亿个别名地址。我们希望通过公开发布 AddrMiner 并分享我们的数据，进一步打开 IPv6 测量研究的大门。

items.title: KSG: Augmenting Kernel Fuzzing with System Call Specification Generation.
items.abstract: Kernel fuzzing is a dynamic testing technique that has successfully found numerous kernel vulnerabilities. However, existing kernel fuzzers, such as Syzkaller, depend on system call specifications to generate test cases. Writing such specifications requires an immense amount of domain knowledge while being extremely laborious. Meanwhile, automated generation of the specification is still an open problem due to the complexity of the kernel, including entry function extraction and input type identification. As a result, the current amount of system call information is insufficient to test the entire kernel code base thoroughly. Syzkaller covers an average of 38% of Linux kernel code with current Syzlang specifications for a prolonged time of fuzzing. In this paper, we propose KSG to generate system call specifications for kernel fuzzers automatically. First, it utilizes probe-based tracing to extract entry functions accurately. Then, it uses path-sensitive analysis to collect precise input types and range constraints in each execution path of entry functions. Based on the aforementioned information, KSG generates specifications in the domain language Syzlang, which is used by most kernel fuzzers. We evaluated KSG on several versions of the Linux kernel. It automatically generated 2433 unique specifications. Leveraging the newly generated specifications, Syzkaller and Moonshine achieved coverage improvements of 22% and 23% respectively. Furthermore, our approach assisted fuzzers to discover 26 previously unknown bugs, where 13 and 6 bugs were fixed and assigned with CVEs, respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 内核模糊测试是一种动态测试技术，已成功发现大量内核漏洞。然而，现有的内核模糊器（例如 Syzkaller）依赖系统调用规范来生成测试用例。编写这样的规范需要大量的领域知识，而且非常费力。同时，由于内核的复杂性，规范的自动生成仍然是一个悬而未决的问题，包括入口函数提取和输入类型识别。因此，当前的系统调用信息量不足以彻底测试整个内核代码库。 Syzkaller 按照当前 Syzlang 规范平均覆盖了 38% 的 Linux 内核代码，可进行长时间的模糊测试。在本文中，我们提出 KSG 自动生成内核模糊器的系统调用规范。首先，它利用基于探针的跟踪来准确提取入口函数。然后，它使用路径敏感分析来收集入口函数的每个执行路径中的精确输入类型和范围约束。根据上述信息，KSG 使用域语言 Syzlang 生成规范，大多数内核模糊器都使用该语言。我们在多个版本的 Linux 内核上评估了 KSG。它自动生成2433个独特的规格。利用新生成的规范，Syzkaller 和 Moonshine 的覆盖率分别提高了 22% 和 23%。此外，我们的方法帮助模糊器发现了 26 个以前未知的错误，其中分别修复了 13 个和 6 个错误并分配了 CVE。

items.title: Surprise-Inspired Networking.
items.abstract: The Information Theory concept of surprisal suggests that, in the future, the most valuable information will be the "new" information entering the cloud from the edge rather than the "prior" information that is stored and processed deeper within the cloud. This talk will discuss the implications of this relatively simple concept for future systems and networks. In particular, it will focus on the role that "near the edge" computing and storage can play in synthesizing the "new" and "old" information.
items.abstract_zh: 信息论的惊喜概念表明，未来最有价值的信息将是从边缘进入云的“新”信息，而不是在云中更深处存储和处理的“先前”信息。本次演讲将讨论这个相对简单的概念对未来系统和网络的影响。特别是，它将重点关注“近边缘”计算和存储在综合“新”和“旧”信息中可以发挥的作用。

items.title: StRAID: Stripe-threaded Architecture for Parity-based RAIDs with Ultra-fast SSDs.
items.abstract: Popular software storage architecture Linux Multiple-Disk (MD) for parity-based RAID (e.g., RAID5 and RAID6) assigns one or more centralized worker threads to efficiently process all user requests based on multi-stage asynchronous control and global data structures, successfully exploiting characteristics of slow devices, e.g., Hard Disk Drives (HDDs). However, we observe that, with high-performance NVMe-based Solid State Drives (SSDs), even the recently added multi-worker processing mode in MD achieves only limited performance gain because of the severe lock contentions under intensive write workloads. In this paper, we propose a novel stripe-threaded RAID architecture, StRAID, assigning a dedicated worker thread for each stripe-write (one-for-one model) to sufficiently exploit high parallelism inherent among RAID stripes, multi-core processors, and SSDs. For the notoriously performance-punishing partial-stripe writes, StRAID presents a two-phase stripe write mechanism to opportunistically aggregate stripe-associated writes to minimize write I/Os; and designs a parity cache to reduce write-induced read I/Os on parity disks. We evaluate a StRAID prototype with a variety of benchmarks and real-world traces. StRAID is demonstrated to consistently outperform MD by up to 5.8 times in write throughput without affecting the read performance.
items.abstract_zh: 用于基于奇偶校验的 RAID（例如 RAID5 和 RAID6）的流行软件存储架构 Linux 多磁盘 (MD) 分配一个或多个集中式工作线程，基于多级异步控制和全局数据结构有效地处理所有用户请求，成功地利用了慢速设备（例如硬盘驱动器 (HDD)）的特性。然而，我们观察到，对于基于 NVMe 的高性能固态硬盘 (SSD)，即使是最近在 MD 中添加的多工作处理模式，由于密集写入工作负载下存在严重的锁争用，也只能实现有限的性能提升。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的条带线程 RAID 架构 StRAID，为每个条带写入（一对一模型）分配专用工作线程，以充分利用 RAID 条带、多核处理器和 SSD 之间固有的高并行性。对于臭名昭著的影响性能的部分条带写入，StRAID 提出了一种两阶段条带写入机制，可以机会性地聚合与条带相关的写入，以最大限度地减少写入 I/O；并设计奇偶校验缓存以减少奇偶校验磁盘上写入引起的读取 I/O。我们使用各种基准和真实跟踪来评估 StRAID 原型。事实证明，StRAID 的写入吞吐量始终优于 MD 高达 5.8 倍，且不影响读取性能。

items.title: BBQ: A Block-based Bounded Queue for Exchanging Data and Profiling.
items.abstract: Concurrent bounded queues have been widely used for exchanging data and profiling in operating systems, databases, and multithreaded applications. The performance of state-of-the-art queues is limited by the interference between multiple enqueues (enq-enq), multiple dequeues (deq-deq), or enqueues and dequeues (enq-deq), negatively affecting their latency and scalability. Although some existing designs employ optimizations to reduce deq-deq and enq-enq interference, they often neglect the enq-deq case. In fact, such partial optimizations may inadvertently increase interference elsewhere and result in performance degradation. We present Block-based Bounded Queue (BBQ), a novel ringbuffer design that splits the entire buffer into multiple blocks. This eliminates enq-deq interference on concurrency control variables when producers and consumers operate on different blocks. Furthermore, the block-based design is amenable to existing optimizations, e.g., using the more scalable fetch-and-add instruction. Our evaluation shows that BBQ outperforms several industrial ringbuffers. For example, in single-producer/single-consumer micro-benchmarks, BBQ yields 11.3x to 42.4x higher throughput than the ringbuffers from Linux kernel, DPDK, Boost, and Folly libraries. In real-world scenarios, BBQ achieves up to 1.5x, 50.5x, and 11.1x performance improvements in benchmarks of DPDK, Linux io_uring, and Disruptor, respectively. We verified and optimized BBQ on weak memory models with a model-checking-based framework.
items.abstract_zh: 并发有界队列已广泛用于操作系统、数据库和多线程应用程序中的数据交换和分析。最先进队列的性能受到多个入队 (enq-enq)、多个出队 (deq-deq) 或入队和出队 (enq-deq) 之间的干扰的限制，从而对其延迟和可扩展性产生负面影响。尽管一些现有设计采用优化来减少 deq-deq 和 enq-enq 干扰，但它们经常忽略 enq-deq 情况。事实上，这种部分优化可能会无意中增加其他地方的干扰并导致性能下降。我们提出了基于块的有界队列（BBQ），这是一种新颖的环形缓冲区设计，它将整个缓冲区分成多个块。当生产者和消费者在不同的块上操作时，这消除了并发控制变量的 enq-deq 干扰。此外，基于块的设计适合现有的优化，例如使用更具可扩展性的获取和添加指令。我们的评估表明 BBQ 的性能优于多种工业环形缓冲区。例如，在单生产者/单消费者微基准中，BBQ 的吞吐量比 Linux 内核、DPDK、Boost 和 Folly 库的环形缓冲区高 11.3 倍到 42.4 倍。在实际场景中，BBQ 在 DPDK、Linux io_uring 和 Disruptor 基准测试中分别实现了高达 1.5 倍、50.5 倍和 11.1 倍的性能提升。我们使用基于模型检查的框架在弱内存模型上验证和优化了 BBQ。

items.title: FpgaNIC: An FPGA-based Versatile 100Gb SmartNIC for GPUs.
items.abstract: Given that the increasing rate of network bandwidth is far ahead of that of the compute capacity of host CPU, which by default processes network packets, SmartNIC has been introduced to offload packet processing, even application logic. Modern GPUs have already become a key computing engine in a broad range of applications such as Artificial Intelligence (AI) and High Performance Computing (HPC), which always need massive computing power that a single GPU server cannot afford. When processing these applications, the distributed pool of GPUs generates the majority of network traffic in a cluster of such servers. The commercially available multi-core SmartNICs, such as BlueFiled-2, fail to process 100Gb network traffic at line rate with its embedded CPU, which is capable of doing control-plane management only. The commercially available FPGA-based SmartNICs are mainly optimized for network applications that run on the host CPU. We intend to develop a GPU-oriented SmartNIC to accelerate a broad range of distributed applications on distributed GPUs. To this end, we present FpgaNIC, an FPGA-based GPU-centric versatile SmartNIC that enables direct PCIe P2P communication with local GPUs using GPU virtual address, and that provides reliable 100Gb hardware network transport to communicate with remote GPUs. The above two components consume fewer than 20% FPGA resources on a mid-size FPGA, so FpgaNIC has sufficient resources for a customized data-path accelerator that allows offloading complex compute tasks on the FPGA for line-rate in-network computing, thereby complementing the processing at the GPU. FpgaNIC has been designed to explore the design space of SmartNICs, e.g., direct, on-path, and off-path models, each of which benefits different types of applications. We believe that FpgaNIC opens up a wealth of research opportunities, e.g., accelerating a broad range of distributed applications by combining GPUs and FPGAs and exploring a larger design space of SmartNICs by making them easily accessible from local GPUs. FpgaNIC allows to prototype applications that can eventually be migrated to hardened SmartNICs.
items.abstract_zh: 鉴于网络带宽的增长速度远远超过了默认处理网络数据包的主机CPU的计算能力，SmartNIC被引入来卸载数据包处理，甚至应用程序逻辑。现代 GPU 已经成为人工智能 (AI) 和高性能计算 (HPC) 等广泛应用中的关键计算引擎，这些应用始终需要单个 GPU 服务器无法承受的巨大计算能力。处理这些应用程序时，分布式 GPU 池会在此类服务器集群中生成大部分网络流量。市售的多核 SmartNIC（例如 BlueFiled-2）无法通过其嵌入式 CPU 以线速处理 100Gb 网络流量，该 CPU 只能进行控制平面管理。市售的基于 FPGA 的 SmartNIC 主要针对在主机 CPU 上运行的网络应用程序进行优化。我们打算开发面向 GPU 的 SmartNIC，以加速分布式 GPU 上的各种分布式应用程序。为此，我们推出了 FpgaNIC，这是一种基于 FPGA 的、以 GPU 为中心的多功能 SmartNIC，它能够使用 GPU 虚拟地址与本地 GPU 进行直接 PCIe P2P 通信，并提供可靠的 100Gb 硬件网络传输来与远程 GPU 进行通信。上述两个组件在中型 FPGA 上消耗的 FPGA 资源不到 20%，因此 FpgaNIC 有足够的资源用于定制数据路径加速器，允许将复杂的计算任务卸载到 FPGA 上进行线速网内计算，从而补充 GPU 的处理。 FpgaNIC 旨在探索 SmartNIC 的设计空间，例如直接、路径上和路径外模型，每种模型都有利于不同类型的应用程序。我们相信 FpgaNIC 开辟了丰富的研究机会，例如，通过结合 GPU 和 FPGA 来加速广泛的分布式应用，并通过使本地 GPU 轻松访问 SmartNIC 来探索更大的 SmartNIC 设计空间。 FpgaNIC 允许对应用程序进行原型设计，最终可以迁移到强化的 SmartNIC。

items.title: Pacman: An Efficient Compaction Approach for Log-Structured Key-Value Store on Persistent Memory.
items.abstract: Recent persistent memory (PM) key-value (KV) stores adopt the log-structured approach to reap PM’s full potential. However, they fail to sustain high performance at high capacity utilization due to inefficient compaction. The inefficiency results from the unawareness of PM’s characteristics. This paper proposes Pacman, an efficient PM-aware compaction approach for log-structured KV stores on PM. Pacman (1) offloads reference search during compaction to service threads, so as to mitigate the onerous index traversal overhead, (2) leverages tagged pointer and DRAM-resident compaction information to avoid excessive PM accesses introduced by garbage collection, (3) redesigns the compaction pipeline based on the PM peculiarities to lower the persistence overhead, and (4) separates hot and cold objects in a lightweight manner to reduce PM data copying in compaction. We apply Pacman to state-of-the-art PM-based log-structured KV stores and evaluate Pacman using various benchmarks. Our evaluations show that Pacman curtails the performance degradation at high capacity utilization, increases the compaction bandwidth by 2-4×, and boosts the performance of the state-of-the-art systems by 1.5-1.8× under write-intensive workloads.
items.abstract_zh: 最近的持久内存 (PM) 键值 (KV) 存储采用日志结构方法来充分发挥 PM 的潜力。然而，由于压缩效率低下，它们无法在高容量利用率下维持高性能。效率低下是由于不了解 PM 的特征造成的。本文提出了 Pacman，这是一种高效的 PM 感知压缩方法，用于 PM 上的日志结构 KV 存储。 Pacman (1) 将压缩过程中的引用搜索卸载到服务线程，以减轻繁重的索引遍历开销，(2) 利用标记指针和 DRAM 驻留压缩信息来避免垃圾收集引入的过多 PM 访问，(3) 根据 PM 特性重新设计压缩管道，以降低持久性开销，(4) 以轻量级方式分离冷热对象，以减少压缩中的 PM 数据复制。我们将 Pacman 应用于最先进的基于 PM 的日志结构 KV 存储，并使用各种基准评估 Pacman。我们的评估表明，Pacman 减少了高容量利用率下的性能下降，将压缩带宽提高了 2-4 倍，并将写入密集型工作负载下最先进系统的性能提高了 1.5-1.8 倍。

items.title: Zero Overhead Monitoring for Cloud-native Infrastructure using RDMA.
items.abstract: Cloud services have recently undergone a major shift from monolithic designs to microservices running on the cloud-native infrastructure, where monitoring systems are widely deployed to ensure the service level agreement (SLA). Nevertheless, the traditional monitoring system no longer fulfills the demands of cloud-native monitoring, which is observed from our practical experience in Alibaba cloud. Specifically, the monitor occupies resources (e.g., CPU) of the monitored infrastructure, disturbing services running on it. For example, enabling monitor causes jitters/declines of online services in Alibaba's ''double eleven'' shopping festival with high loads. On the other hand, the quality of service (QoS) of monitoring itself, which is vital to track and ensure SLA, is not guaranteed with the high loaded system. In this paper, we design and implement a novel monitoring system, named Zero, for cloud-native monitoring. First, Zero achieves zero overhead to collect raw metrics from the monitored hosts using \textit{one-sided} remote direct memory access (RDMA) operations, thus avoiding any interferences to cloud services. Second, Zero adopts receiver-driven model to collect monitoring metrics with high QoS, where credit-based flow control and hybrid I/O model are proposed to mitigate network congestion/interference and CPU bottlenecks. Zero has been deployed and evaluated in Alibaba cloud. Deployment results show that Zero achieves no CPU occupation at the monitored host and supports 1 sim 10k hosts with 0.1 sim 1s sampling interval using single thread for network I/O.
items.abstract_zh: 云服务最近经历了从整体设计到在云原生基础设施上运行的微服务的重大转变，其中广泛部署监控系统以确保服务级别协议（SLA）。但从我们在阿里云的实践经验来看，传统的监控系统已经不能满足云原生监控的需求。具体来说，监控器占用受监控基础设施的资源（例如CPU），干扰其上运行的服务。例如，阿里巴巴“双十一”购物节负载较高时，启用监控会导致在线服务出现抖动/下降。另一方面，对于跟踪和确保 SLA 至关重要的监控本身的服务质量 (QoS) 在高负载系统中无法得到保证。在本文中，我们设计并实现了一种新颖的监控系统，名为 Zero，用于云原生监控。首先，Zero 实现了零开销，使用 \textit{one-side} 远程直接内存访问 (RDMA) 操作从受监控的主机收集原始指标，从而避免对云服务的任何干扰。其次，Zero采用接收器驱动模型来收集高QoS的监控指标，其中提出了基于信用的流量控制和混合I/O模型来缓解网络拥塞/干扰和CPU瓶颈。 Zero已在阿里云部署并评估。部署结果表明，Zero实现了被监控主机不占用CPU，支持1 sim 10k主机，采样间隔为0.1 sim 1s，使用单线程进行网络I/O。

items.title: KRCORE: A Microsecond-scale RDMA Control Plane for Elastic Computing.
items.abstract: We present KRCORE, an RDMA library with a microsecond-scale control plane on commodity RDMA hardware for elastic computing. KRCORE can establish a full-fledged RDMA connection within 10μs (hundreds or thousands of times faster than verbs), while only maintaining a (small) fixed-sized connection metadata at each node, regardless of the cluster scale. The key ideas include virtualizing pre-initialized kernel-space RDMA connections instead of creating one from scratch, and retrofitting advanced RDMA dynamic connected transport with static transport for both low connection overhead and high networking speed. Under load spikes, KRCORE can shorten the worker bootstrap time of an existing disaggregated key-value store (namely RACE Hashing) by 83%. In serverless computing (namely Fn), KRCORE can also reduce the latency for transferring data through RDMA by 99%.
items.abstract_zh: 我们推出了 KRCORE，这是一个 RDMA 库，在商品 RDMA 硬件上具有微秒级控制平面，用于弹性计算。 KRCORE 可以在 10μs 内建立成熟的 RDMA 连接（比动词快数百或数千倍），同时仅在每个节点维护（小型）固定大小的连接元数据，无论集群规模如何。关键思想包括虚拟化预初始化的内核空间 RDMA 连接，而不是从头开始创建连接，以及用静态传输改造先进的 RDMA 动态连接传输，以实现低连接开销和高网络速度。在负载峰值下，KRCORE 可以将现有分类键值存储（即 RACE Hashing）的工作进程引导时间缩短 83%。在无服务器计算（即Fn）中，KRCORE还可以将通过RDMA传输数据的延迟降低99%。

items.title: Hashing Design in Modern Networks: Challenges and Mitigation Techniques.
items.abstract: Traffic load balancing across multiple paths is a critical task for modern networks to reduce network congestion and improve network efficiency. Hashing which is the foundation of traffic load balancing still faces practical challenges. The key problem is there is a growing need for more hash functions because networks are getting larger with more switches, more stages, and increased path diversity. Meanwhile, topology and routing become more agile in order to efficiently serve traffic demands with stricter throughput and latency SLAs. On the other hand, current generation switch chips only provide a limited number of uncorrelated hash functions. We first demonstrate why the limited number of hashing functions is a practical challenge in today's datacenter network (DCN) and wide-area network (WAN) designs. Then, to mitigate the problem, we propose a novel approach named color recombining which enables hash functions to reuse via leveraging topology traits of multi-stage DCN networks. We also describe a novel framework based on coprime theory to mitigate hash correlation in generic mesh topologies (i.e., spineless DCN and WAN). Our evaluation using real network trace data and topologies demonstrate that we can reduce the extent of load imbalance (measured by the coefficient of variation) by an order of magnitude.
items.abstract_zh: 多条路径上的流量负载均衡是现代网络减少网络拥塞、提高网络效率的关键任务。作为流量负载均衡基础的哈希仍然面临着实际挑战。关键问题是对更多哈希函数的需求不断增长，因为网络变得越来越大，交换机越来越多，阶段越来越多，路径多样性也越来越多。同时，拓扑和路由变得更加敏捷，以便通过更严格的吞吐量和延迟 SLA 有效地满足流量需求。另一方面，当前一代交换芯片仅提供有限数量的不相关散列函数。我们首先演示为什么有限数量的哈希函数是当今数据中心网络 (DCN) 和广域网 (WAN) 设计中的实际挑战。然后，为了缓解这个问题，我们提出了一种名为颜色重组的新方法，它可以通过利用多级 DCN 网络的拓扑特征来重用哈希函数。我们还描述了一种基于互质理论的新颖框架，以减轻通用网状拓扑（即无骨干 DCN 和 WAN）中的哈希相关性。我们使用真实网络跟踪数据和拓扑进行的评估表明，我们可以将负载不平衡的程度（通过变异系数衡量）减少一个数量级。

items.title: Towards Latency Awareness for Content Delivery Network Caching.
items.abstract: Caches are pervasively used in content delivery networks (CDNs) to serve requests close to users and thus reduce content access latency. However, designing latency-optimal caches are challenging in the presence of delayed hits, which occur in high-throughput systems when multiple requests for the same content occur before the content is fetched from the remote server. In this paper, we propose a novel timer-based mechanism that provably optimizes the mean caching latency, providing a theoretical basis for the understanding and design of latency-aware (LA) caching that is fundamental to content delivery in latency-sensitive systems. Our timer-based model is able to derive a simple ranking function which quickly informs us the priority of a content for our goal to minimize latency. Based on that we propose a lightweight latency-aware caching algorithm named LA-Cache. We have implemented a prototype within Apache Traffic Server, a popular CDN server. The latency achieved by our implementations agrees closely with theoretical predictions of our model. Our experimental results using production traces show that LA-Cache consistently reduces latencies by 5%-15% compared to state-of-the-art methods depending on the backend RTTs.
items.abstract_zh: 缓存广泛用于内容交付网络 (CDN)，以服务靠近用户的请求，从而减少内容访问延迟。然而，在存在延迟命中的情况下，设计延迟最优缓存具有挑战性，这种情况发生在高吞吐量系统中，当在从远程服务器获取内容之前发生对同一内容的多个请求时。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的基于计时器的机制，可证明优化平均缓存延迟，为理解和设计延迟感知（LA）缓存提供了理论基础，这对于延迟敏感系统中的内容交付至关重要。我们基于计时器的模型能够导出一个简单的排名函数，该函数可以快速告知我们内容的优先级，以实现最小化延迟的目标。在此基础上，我们提出了一种轻量级延迟感知缓存算法，名为 LA-Cache。我们在流行的 CDN 服务器 Apache Traffic Server 中实现了一个原型。我们的实现所实现的延迟与我们模型的理论预测非常一致。我们使用生产跟踪的实验结果表明，与取决于后端 RTT 的最先进方法相比，LA-Cache 始终将延迟降低了 5%-15%。

items.title: Secure and Lightweight Deduplicated Storage via Shielded Deduplication-Before-Encryption.
items.abstract: Outsourced storage should fulfill confidentiality and storage efficiency for large-scale data management. Conventional approaches often combine encryption and deduplication based on deduplication-after-encryption (DaE), which first performs encryption followed by deduplication on encrypted data. We argue that DaE has fundamental limitations that lead to various drawbacks in performance, storage savings, and security in secure deduplication systems. In this paper, we study an unexplored paradigm called deduplication-before-encryption (DbE), which first performs deduplication and encrypts only non-duplicate data. DbE has the benefits of mitigating the performance and storage penalties caused by the management of duplicate data, but its deduplication process is no longer protected by encryption. To this end, we design DEBE, a shielded DbE-based deduplicated storage system that protects deduplication via Intel SGX. DEBE builds on frequency-based deduplication that first removes duplicates of frequent data in a space-constrained SGX enclave and then removes all remaining duplicates outside the enclave. Experiments show that DEBE outperforms state-of-the-art DaE approaches.
items.abstract_zh: 外包存储应满足大规模数据管理的保密性和存储效率。传统方法通常基于加密后重复数据删除（DaE）将加密和重复数据删除相结合，首先对加密数据执行加密，然后再进行重复数据删除。我们认为 DaE 具有根本性的局限性，导致安全重复数据删除系统在性能、存储节省和安全性方面存在各种缺陷。在本文中，我们研究了一种未被探索的范例，称为加密前重复数据删除（DbE），它首先执行重复数据删除并仅加密非重复数据。 DbE 的优点是可以减轻因管理重复数据而造成的性能和存储损失，但其重复数据删除过程不再受加密保护。为此，我们设计了DEBE，一种基于DbE的屏蔽式重复数据删除存储系统，通过Intel SGX保护重复数据删除。 DEBE 基于基于频率的重复数据删除，首先删除空间有限的 SGX enclave 中频繁数据的重复项，然后删除 enclave 外部的所有剩余重复项。实验表明 DEBE 的性能优于最先进的 DaE 方法。

items.title: CacheSack: Admission Optimization for Google Datacenter Flash Caches.
items.abstract: This paper describes the algorithm, implementation, and deployment experience of CacheSack, the admission algorithm for Google datacenter flash caches. CacheSack minimizes the dominant costs of Google’s datacenter flash caches: disk IO and flash footprint. CacheSack partitions cache traffic into disjoint categories, analyzes the observed cache benefit of each subset, and formulates a knapsack problem to assign the optimal admission policy to each subset. Prior to this work, Google datacenter flash cache admission policies were optimized manually, with most caches using the Lazy Adaptive Replacement Cache (LARC) algorithm. Production experiments showed that CacheSack significantly outperforms the prior static admission policies for a 6.5% improvement of the total operational cost, as well as significant improvements in disk reads and flash wearout.
items.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 Google 数据中心闪存缓存准入算法 CacheSack 的算法、实现和部署经验。 CacheSack 最大限度地降低了 Google 数据中心闪存缓存的主要成本：磁盘 IO 和闪存占用空间。 CacheSack 将缓存流量划分为不相交的类别，分析每个子集观察到的缓存效益，并制定背包问题以将最佳准入策略分配给每个子集。在此工作之前，Google 数据中心闪存缓存准入策略是手动优化的，大多数缓存使用惰性自适应替换缓存 (LARC) 算法。生产实验表明，CacheSack 的性能显着优于之前的静态准入策略，总运营成本降低了 6.5%，并且磁盘读取和闪存磨损也得到了显着改善。

items.title: RRC: Responsive Replicated Containers.
items.abstract: Replication is the basic mechanism for providing application-transparent reliability through fault tolerance. The design and implementation of replication mechanisms is particularly challenging for general multithreaded services, where high latency overhead is not acceptable. Most of the existing replication mechanisms fail to meet this challenge. RRC is a fully-operational fault tolerance mechanism for multiprocessor workloads, based on container replication. It minimizes the latency overhead during normal operation by addressing two key sources of this overhead: (1) it decouples the latency overhead from checkpointing frequency using a hybrid of checkpointing and replay, and (2) it minimizes the pause time for checkpointing by forking a clone of the container to be checkpointed, thus allowing execution to proceed in parallel with checkpointing. The fact that RRC is based on checkpointing makes it inherently less vulnerable to data races than active replication. In addition, RRC includes mechanisms that further reduce the vulnerability to data races, resulting in high recovery rates, as long as the rate of manifested data races is low. The evaluation includes measurement of the recovery rate and recovery latency based on thousands of fault injections. On average, RRC delays responses to clients by less than 400mu's and recovers in less than 1s. The average pause latency is less than 3.3ms. For a set of eight real-world benchmarks, if data races are eliminated, the performance overhead of RRC is under 48%.
items.abstract_zh: 复制是通过容错提供应用程序透明可靠性的基本机制。复制机制的设计和实现对于一般的多线程服务来说尤其具有挑战性，因为高延迟开销是不可接受的。大多数现有的复制机制无法应对这一挑战。 RRC 是一种基于容器复制的、针对多处理器工作负载的完全可操作的容错机制。它通过解决此开销的两个关键来源来最大限度地减少正常操作期间的延迟开销：（1）它使用检查点和重放的混合方式将延迟开销与检查点频率解耦；（2）它通过分叉要设置检查点的容器的克隆来最大限度地减少检查点的暂停时间，从而允许执行与检查点并行进行。 RRC 基于检查点的事实使其本质上比主动复制更不易受到数据争用的影响。此外，RRC 还包括进一步减少数据争用漏洞的机制，只要表现出的数据争用率较低，即可实现高恢复率。评估包括基于数千次故障注入的恢复率和恢复延迟的测量。平均而言，RRC 对客户端的响应延迟小于 400mu，恢复时间小于 1s。平均暂停延迟小于3.3ms。对于一组八个真实世界基准，如果消除数据竞争，RRC 的性能开销将低于 48%。

items.title: PetS: A Unified Framework for Parameter-Efficient Transformers Serving.
items.abstract: Deploying large-scale Transformer models under the conventional pre-train-then-fine-tune paradigm is impractical for multi-task serving, because a full model copy for each downstream task must be maintained, quickly exhausting the storage budget. Recent algorithmic advances in Parameter-Efficient Transformers (PETs) have shown enormous potential to mitigate the storage overhead. They share the pre-trained model among tasks and only fine-tune a small portion of task-specific parameters. Unfortunately, existing serving systems neither have flexible PET task management mechanisms nor can efficiently serve queries to different tasks in batches. Therefore, we propose PetS, the first unified framework for multi-task PETs serving. Specifically, different PET tasks are expressed by a unified representation in the same framework, which enables flexible PET tasks management. Based on the unified representation, we design a specialized PET inference engine to batch different tasks' queries together and execute them with task-agnostic shared operators and task-specific PET operators. To further improve system throughput, we propose a coordinated batching strategy to deal with arbitrary input queries. We also develop a PET operator scheduling strategy to exploit parallelism between PET tasks. Comprehensive experiments on Edge/Desktop/Server GPUs demonstrate that PetS supports up to 25 times more concurrent tasks and improves the serving throughput by 1.53 times and 1.63 times on Desktop and Server GPUs, respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 在传统的预训练然后微调范例下部署大规模 Transformer 模型对于多任务服务来说是不切实际的，因为必须维护每个下游任务的完整模型副本，从而很快耗尽存储预算。参数高效变压器 (PET) 的最新算法进展显示出减少存储开销的巨大潜力。他们在任务之间共享预先训练的模型，并且只微调一小部分特定于任务的参数。不幸的是，现有的服务系统既没有灵活的PET任务管理机制，也不能高效地批量服务于不同任务的查询。因此，我们提出了 PetS，这是第一个多任务 PET 服务的统一框架。具体来说，不同的PET任务在同一框架中通过统一的表示来表达，从而实现灵活的PET任务管理。基于统一表示，我们设计了一个专门的 PET 推理引擎，将不同任务的查询一起批处理，并使用与任务无关的共享运算符和特定于任务的 PET 运算符来执行它们。为了进一步提高系统吞吐量，我们提出了一种协调批处理策略来处理任意输入查询。我们还开发了 PET 操作员调度策略来利用 PET 任务之间的并行性。在边缘/桌面/服务器 GPU 上的综合实验表明，PetS 支持最多 25 倍的并发任务，并将桌面和服务器 GPU 上的服务吞吐量分别提高了 1.53 倍和 1.63 倍。

items.title: Building a High-performance Fine-grained Deduplication Framework for Backup Storage with High Deduplication Ratio.
items.abstract: Fine-grained deduplication, which first removes identical chunks and then eliminates redundancies between similar but non-identical chunks (i.e., delta compression), could exploit workloads' compressibility to achieve a very high deduplication ratio but suffers from poor backup/restore performance. This makes it not as popular as chunk-level deduplication thus far. This is because allowing workloads to share more references among similar chunks further reduces spatial/temporal locality, causes more I/O overhead, and leads to worse backup/restore performance. In this paper, we address issues for different forms of poor locality with several techniques, and propose MeGA, which achieves backup and restore speed close to chunk-level deduplication while preserving fine-grained deduplication's significant deduplication ratio advantage. Specifically, MeGA applies (1) a backup-workflow-oriented delta selector to address poor locality when reading base chunks, and (2) a delta-friendly data layout and "Always-Forward-Reference" traversing in the restore workflow to deal with the poor spatial/temporal locality of deduplicated data. Evaluations on four datasets show that MeGA achieves a better performance than other fine-grained deduplication approaches. In particular, compared with the traditional greedy approach, MeGA achieves a 4.47–34.45 times higher backup performance and a 30–105 times higher restore performance while maintaining a very high deduplication ratio.
items.abstract_zh: 细粒度重复数据删除首先删除相同的块，然后消除相似但不相同的块之间的冗余（即增量压缩），可以利用工作负载的可压缩性来实现非常高的重复数据删除率，但备份/恢复性能较差。这使得它迄今为止不像块级重复数据删除那么受欢迎。这是因为允许工作负载在相似块之间共享更多引用会进一步降低空间/时间局部性，导致更多 I/O 开销，并导致备份/恢复性能变差。在本文中，我们通过多种技术解决了不同形式的不良局部性问题，并提出了MeGA，它实现了接近块级重复数据删除的备份和恢复速度，同时保留了细粒度重复数据删除的显着重复数据删除率优势。具体来说，MeGA 应用 (1) 面向备份工作流的增量选择器来解决读取基本块时较差的局部性问题，以及 (2) 增量友好的数据布局和恢复工作流中的“始终向前引用”遍历，以处理重复数据删除数据的较差的空间/时间局部性。对四个数据集的评估表明，MeGA 比其他细粒度重复数据删除方法取得了更好的性能。特别是，与传统的贪婪方法相比，MeGA 在保持非常高的重复数据删除率的同时，实现了 4.47-34.45 倍的备份性能提高和 30-105 倍的恢复性能提高。
